Competency probe: Stop reads and downstream work on abort, remove partial artifacts, record bounded causal evidence, and test slow, truncated, malformed, oversized, and changed bodies.

For Node and Express server Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Body Abort Cleanup Evidence, challenge the documented misconception with request, response, fault, policy, and transfer evidence: When the client disconnects, Node automatically rolls back every application effect and removes temporary files.
